---
title: "Multiple Pages"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
```

Page 1
=====================================  

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart A

```{r}

```

Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart B

```{r}

```

### Chart C

```{r}

```


Page 2 {data-orientation=rows}
=====================================  

Row {data-height=600}
-------------------------------------

### Chart 1

```{r}
```

Row {data-height=400}
-------------------------------------
   
### Chart 2

```{r}
```   
    
### Chart 3

```{r}
```
